title: Crash when using -chparam and '0 as input to a module

features.name: unbased_unsized_literal_as_module_input
features.description: Code should include an unbased unsized literal ('0) used as an input port connection to a module instantiation

features.name: chparam_with_replication_in_module
features.description: Code should include a module with a parameter used in a replication construct, where the parameter can be modified via -chparam

features.name: parameterized_module_hierarchy_with_literal_input
features.description: Code should include nested parameterized modules where the inner module has a scalar input connected to an unbased unsized literal, and the outer module parameter can be overridden via -chparam
